mapper.select: SELECT sm.`id`, sm.`name`, sm.`parent_id` AS pid FROM `mk_sys_permissions` AS sm LEFT JOIN `mk_sys_role_permissions` AS srm ON sm.`id` = srm.`permission_id` LEFT JOIN `mk_sys_user_role` AS sr ON srm.`role_id` = sr.`role_id` WHERE sm.`is_delete` = 0 And sm.`keep_alive` = 0 AND sm.`type` IN (-1, 0, 1) AND sr.`user_id` = #{sysUserId} GROUP BY sm.`id` ORDER BY sm.`id`
SELECT t1.`permission_id` FROM `mk_sys_role_permissions` AS t1 LEFT JOIN mk_sys_permissions AS t2 ON t1.permission_id = t2.id WHERE t1.role_id = #{roleId} AND t2.parent_id != 0
